generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance LightingDimmerActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Physical actuator for lighting dimmers embedded in BIM models to dynamically adjust lighting levels based on control logic from the Digital Twin"
]

instance HVACActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "HVAC system actuator integrated within BIM models for real-time temperature and airflow control adjustments via DT commands"
]

instance OccupancyControlActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator for occupancy-based lighting/HVAC control systems that receives commands from the Digital Twin for dynamic adjustments"
]

// C3: Physical sensing components
instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Post-occupancy occupancy detector integrated into BIM models to capture real-time occupancy levels for adaptive control"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyData
]

instance AmbientLightSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Ambient light sensor embedded in BIM models to measure real-time light levels for energy-efficient lighting adjustments"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightLevelData
]

instance EnergyMeter : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Energy consumption meter integrated into BIM models to track real-time power usage for building performance monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnergyConsumptionData
]

instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Building temperature sensor capturing real-time HVAC operational data for energy optimization"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureData
]

instance ControlLogicSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor capturing control logic configurations extracted from BIM models for runtime validation and adaptation"
    DTDFVocab:producedData ControlConfigurationData
]

// C4: Data transmission
instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance LightLevelData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AmbientLightSensor
]

instance EnergyConsumptionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnergyMeter
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance ControlConfigurationData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ControlLogicSensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance BIMLightingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM model of building lighting components enriched with sensor configurations and control logic for Digital Twin integration"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BIMEnrichmentPipeline
]

instance BIMHVACModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM model of HVAC systems containing geometric, spatial, and functional attributes with embedded control logic"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BIMEnrichmentPipeline
]

instance RealTimeOperationalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Structured real-time operational data combining sensor readings (occupancy, light levels, energy consumption) with BIM-enriched metadata"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyData, LightLevelData, EnergyConsumptionData, TemperatureData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDitto
]

instance ControlPolicyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Runtime metadata containing reinforcement learning-based control policies generated by BOREALIS framework for adaptive building automation"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ControlConfigurationData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ReinforcementLearningFramework
]

instance BIMMetadata : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Enriched BIM metadata including sensor IDs, device configurations, and spatial relationships for model-to-model transformations"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenTransformations
]

// C11: Enablers
instance BIMEnrichmentPipeline : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-driven engineering pipeline automating BIM enrichment with sensor configurations and control logic via transformations"
]

instance ModelDrivenTransformations : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Framework enabling model-to-model and model-to-text transformations for automating BIM-to-DT data conversion"
]

instance EclipseDitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto middleware facilitating bidirectional data exchange between physical sensors and Digital Twin runtime artifacts"
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono IoT connectivity framework enabling real-time bidirectional communication between physical building assets and Digital Twin"
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 platform providing immersive visualization of Digital Twin building states for interactive monitoring"
]

instance ReinforcementLearningFramework : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BOREALIS reinforcement learning framework integrating post-occupancy data for adaptive energy optimization policies"
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing real-time monitoring of building states (lighting, HVAC, occupancy) via Unreal Engine 5 visualization"
    DTDFVocab:provides BuildingStateInsight
]

instance PredictiveEnergyOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics service using reinforcement learning for energy-efficient lighting and HVAC control"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationInsight
]

instance ControlAutomationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "BIM-centric control framework automating lighting and HVAC adjustments based on Digital Twin commands"
    DTDFVocab:provides DynamicControlAction
]

instance PerformanceAnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for clash detection, BIM-to-DT synchronization validation, and operational performance analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides PerformanceValidationInsight
]

instance CustomExtensibilityService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Framework for DT Engineers' plugins enabling custom analytics and IoT integrations"
    DTDFVocab:provides PluginIntegrationAction
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance BuildingStateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring insights showing lighting usage trends, HVAC performance metrics, and occupancy patterns for facility management"
]

instance EnergyOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics insights for energy consumption patterns enabling proactive optimization of lighting and HVAC systems"
]

instance DynamicControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated control actions adjusting lighting dimmers, HVAC actuators, and occupancy-based systems in real-time"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance PerformanceValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Validation insights for BIM-to-DT synchronization quality, clash detection results, and operational performance metrics"
]

instance PluginIntegrationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Custom extensibility actions allowing DT Engineers to deploy specialized plugins for advanced analytics or IoT integrations"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ControlPolicyUpdate : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Parametric updates to control policies based on real-time operational data and reinforcement learning recommendations"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C12: Environment
instance BuildingInfrastructureEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains LightingDimmerActuator, HVACActuator,
                 OccupancySensor, AmbientLightSensor,
                 EnergyMeter, TemperatureSensor,
                 BIMLightingModel, BIMHVACModel
]

instance DigitalTwinRuntimeEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains EclipseDitto, EclipseHono,
                 UnrealEngine5, ReinforcementLearningFramework,
                 RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveEnergyOptimizationService
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Facilitates **control signal transmission** from the DT to physical building systems through middleware (e.g., **Eclipse Hono**), enabling automated adjustments to lighting, HVAC, or other BCS components. The DT generates control logic derived from BIM-enriched models and runtime analytics (e.g., reinforcement learning in BOREALIS) to optimize energy efficiency and occupant comfort. This interaction is standardized via **service-oriented architecture** with extension points for modular integration."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Operates on a **real-time to near-real-time** scale, with synchronization rates determined by sensor data acquisition frequencies. For lighting control (e.g., TwinLight), adjustments occur in **millisecond-to-second intervals** during runtime, while BOREALIS’ reinforcement learning iterates over **hours-to-days** to refine control policies based on post-occupancy data. The framework ensures **low-latency bidirectional communication** via optimized middleware (Eclipse Hono/Ditto) for critical control loops."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrates a **service-oriented DT ecosystem** where BIM models serve as the central hub. Components include:
  - **Physical assets** (sensors/actuators) linked to BIM via middleware,
  - **Runtime interfaces** (Eclipse Hono/Ditto) for bidirectional communication,
  - **Visualization layer** (Unreal Engine) for immersive monitoring,
  - **Custom services** (DT Engineers’ plugins) for extensibility.
  The constellation ensures **interoperability** via standardized APIs and modular extension points, enabling scalability from single devices to entire infrastructure systems."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers the **entire building lifecycle**: **Design** (BIM modeling with control logic), **Construction** (device integration), **Operation** (real-time monitoring via DT), and **Refurbishment** (dynamic updates via reinforcement learning in BOREALIS). The DT operates as a **dynamic representation** of the physical building, evolving from a static BIM model to an operational control system with runtime adaptations."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Ensures **high fidelity** via:
  - **ODTE metric** (Overall Digital Twin Entanglement) to measure interoperability and architectural soundness between physical and virtual models,
  - **Model-driven validation** of BIM-to-DT transformations,
  - **Uncertainty handling** through real-time sensor data integration (e.g., BOREALIS’ adaptive control policies).
  The framework addresses **verification/validation** by automating metadata extraction and runtime synchronization, reducing manual effort while maintaining alignment between the DT and its physical counterpart."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Establishes **low-latency, bidirectional connections** via:
  - **Eclipse Hono** for IoT device communication (e.g., MQTT protocol),
  - **Eclipse Ditto** for service-oriented data exchange,
  - **Unreal Engine 5** for client-side visualization.
  The technical connection relies on **standardized APIs** and **middleware protocols** to ensure seamless integration with BIM tools and IoT sensors."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Deployed as a **modular, service-oriented platform** with standardized extension points. The DT is hosted on **cloud-based or edge computing infrastructures** (not specified in documents) to support real-time processing. The framework leverages **Unreal Engine 5** for interactive visualization and **Eclipse Hono/Ditto** for runtime data exchange, ensuring scalability across distributed systems."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Enables **interoperability with external systems** via:
  - **Standardized APIs** (e.g., Eclipse Hono/Ditto) for integration with IoT platforms,
  - **BIM compatibility** for collaboration with design/construction tools,
  - **Modular extension points** for custom services (e.g., DT Engineers’ plugins).
  The framework supports **data exchange** with other DTs or enterprise systems (e.g., ERP, BMS) through middleware protocols."
]

instance data_ownership_and_privacy : DTDFVocab:DataOwnershipPrivacy [
    base:desc "Not explicitly detailed in the documents, but implied to follow **AECO industry standards** for data governance. The framework likely assigns **data ownership** to the **building owner/operator**, with **privacy considerations** addressed via:
  - **Encrypted data transmission** (e.g., TLS for Hono/Ditto),
  - **Access controls** for DT Engineers/Facility Managers,
  - **Compliance with BIM standards** (e.g., IFC for interoperability)."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Adheres to **AECO-specific standards** including:
  - **Building Information Modeling (BIM)** as the semantic backbone,
  - **Industry Foundation Classes (IFC)** for interoperability,
  - **Eclipse Hono/Ditto** for IoT connectivity,
  - **Unreal Engine 5** for visualization,
  - **Model-driven engineering (MDE)** methodologies for automation.
  The framework’s **standardized extension points** ensure modularity and scalability across heterogeneous systems."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Implements **cybersecurity measures** for remote DT operations:
  - **Authentication/authorization** for DT Engineers/Facility Managers,
  - **Encrypted data transmission** (e.g., TLS for Hono/Ditto),
  - **Real-time monitoring** to detect anomalies (e.g., unauthorized access),
  - **Safety protocols** for critical control systems (e.g., HVAC/lighting actuators) to prevent accidents.
  The framework ensures **safe remote execution** by validating all interactions via middleware and BIM-enriched models."
]
